mapper.select:
SELECT LS.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, ISNULL(G.PARTTYPE, LS.LOTTYPE) AS PARTTYPE, G.UNIT, G.SAFETYSTOCK, SUM(CASE WHEN LS.LOTSTATE != 'FAIL' THEN SK.STOCKQTY ELSE 0 END) AS GOODQTY, SUM(CASE WHEN LS.LOTSTATE = 'FAIL' THEN SK.STOCKQTY ELSE 0 END) AS FAILQTY, SUM(SK.STOCKQTY) AS TOTALQTY FROM TBL_PROD_STOCK SK JOIN TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE LS ON SK.LOTNO = LS.LOTNO LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON LS.PARTNO = G.PARTNO LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_LOCATION LOC ON SK.LOCATIONCODE = LOC.LOCATIONCODE LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_WAREHOUSE WH ON LOC.WAREHOUSECODE = WH.WAREHOUSECODE
SK.STOCKQTY > 0 AND WH.PLANTCD = #{plant_cd} AND LOC.WAREHOUSECODE = #{warehouse_cd} AND LS.LINECD = #{line_cd} AND LS.PROCESSCD = #{process_cd} AND G.PARTTYPE = #{part_type} AND SK.LOTNO = #{lot_no} AND SK.LOCATIONCODE = #{location_cd} AND (LS.PARTNO LIKE #{search} OR G.PARTNM LIKE #{search})
GROUP BY LS.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, G.PARTTYPE, LS.LOTTYPE, G.UNIT, G.SAFETYSTOCK ORDER BY LS.PARTNO OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT SK.LOTNO, SK.LOCATIONCODE, SK.STOCKQTY, LS.PARTNO, LS.LOTCREATIONDAY, LS.LOTSTATE, LS.ETCINFO, LS.WAREHOUSECODE, WH.WAREHOUSENAME, LOC.LOCATIONNAME, P.PLANTNM FROM TBL_PROD_STOCK SK JOIN TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE LS ON SK.LOTNO = LS.LOTNO LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_LOCATION LOC ON SK.LOCATIONCODE = LOC.LOCATIONCODE LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_WAREHOUSE WH ON LS.WAREHOUSECODE = WH.WAREHOUSECODE LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_PLANT P ON WH.PLANTCD = P.PLANTCD WHERE LS.PARTNO = #{PARTNO} AND SK.STOCKQTY > 0 ORDER BY LS.LOTCREATIONDAY DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_PROD_STOCK SET STOCKQTY = #{STOCKQTY} WHERE LOTNO = #{LOTNO} AND LOCATIONCODE = #{LOCATIONCODE}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROD_STOCK_HISTORY (LOTNO, LOCATIONCODE, STOCKHISTORYNO, QTY, STOCKCHANGEGUBUN, MOVINGLOCATIONCD, CHANGEDAY, REMARK, REF_NO, REGUSERID, REGDTM) VALUES (#{LOTNO}, #{LOCATIONCODE}, #{STOCKHISTORYNO}, #{QTY}, #{STOCKCHANGEGUBUN}, #{MOVINGLOCATIONCD}, GETDATE(), #{REMARK}, #{REF_NO}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT LS.PARTNO) FROM TBL_PROD_STOCK SK JOIN TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE LS ON SK.LOTNO = LS.LOTNO WHERE SK.STOCKQTY > 0) as total_items, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT LS.PARTNO FROM TBL_PROD_STOCK SK JOIN TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE LS ON SK.LOTNO = LS.LOTNO JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON LS.PARTNO = G.PARTNO GROUP BY LS.PARTNO, G.SAFETYSTOCK HAVING SUM(SK.STOCKQTY) < ISNULL(G.SAFETYSTOCK, 0) AND SUM(SK.STOCKQTY) > 0 ) T) as low_stock_items, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT LS.PARTNO FROM TBL_PROD_STOCK SK JOIN TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE LS ON SK.LOTNO = LS.LOTNO JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON LS.PARTNO = G.PARTNO GROUP BY LS.PARTNO, G.SAFETYSTOCK HAVING SUM(SK.STOCKQTY) <= (ISNULL(G.SAFETYSTOCK, 0) * 0.1) ) T) as critical_items
